name: ca77y-engineering
description: Idea-to-shipped development pipeline as Claude Code subagents: researcher, analyst (shapes stories + records cards), lead (takes one task from a prompt or a story card to a single PR — no splitting, no merging, and it drives the PR review loop), writer (authors the task's spec, then its docs), coder (builds the whole task through its own qa/simplify/review loop), qa, reviewer (native code review), auditor (native readiness audits + the acceptance gate), plus the native library crew — librarian, scribe, clerk — that maintains the project's Markdown research library in Claude.
